notes: The poster-derived group-stage schedule is the local schedule authority for group panel match fixtures.
Each four-team group has six current match records for group panel evidence.
Existing current/result evidence is preserved where it corresponds to a poster fixture.
Missing poster fixtures are represented as scheduled local snapshot matches and may show Time TBD when no kickoff time is available.
The browser runtime reads checked-in JSON only and does not scrape ESPN at runtime.
Third-place source-slot semantics are intentionally out of scope for this data repair.
User-provided June 21 Group G/H finals patched: Uruguay 2-2 Cabo Verde and New Zealand 1-3 Egypt.
Belgium 0-0 IR Iran normalized from complete to final so group panels treat all completed Group G/H matches consistently.
